scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n oxide,web -c yellow,cyan "cargo run" "cd web && bun run dev"
scripts.mocks: concurrently -k -n svc1,svc2,svc3 -c blue,magenta,green "node scripts/mock-backend.js 3001" "node scripts/mock-backend.js 3002" "node scripts/mock-backend.js 3003"
scripts.demo: concurrently -k -n svc1,svc2,svc3,oxide,web -c blue,magenta,green,yellow,cyan "node scripts/mock-backend.js 3001" "node scripts/mock-backend.js 3002" "node scripts/mock-backend.js 3003" "cargo run" "cd web && bun run dev"
scripts.build: cargo build --release && cd web && bun run build
